## Changes

## Verification

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make smoke`
- [ ] `make openapi` if API changed

## Claim Check

- [ ] No mock output is presented as real local model inference.
- [ ] No Suno parity claim is made without benchmark evidence.
- [ ] New names follow `docs/engineering/naming_conventions.md`.
